title: Thriller Bark’s Zombies Awaken: Turning Point

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: --- that curly brow cook is gone.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, don't laugh!! They can hear you.

dialogue.text: Well, he's right. Sanji will be OK!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
